name: The Necromancer Cometh! TD
short_description: Outsmart the undead in this strategic tower defense where you control the path. Craft deadly mazes, power up your towers, and fight through a dark fantasy world full of charming characters and spooky enemies!
detailed_description:
THE NECROMANCER COMETH!

The Necromancer Cometh! is a Dark Fantasy Pathbuilding Tower Defense Adventure with fun fantasy characters, spooky enemies, strategic deckbuilding, and limitless pathbuilding.

BUILD YOUR OWN PATH!

In TNC!, there are no preset paths or fixed tower spots—you decide where to place your towers. Your towers will block your enemies, who will then try to navigate through the maze you create, seeking the shortest path to their goal.

Your challenge? Force them to take the longest, most treacherous route possible. Every twist and turn you design could mean the difference between victory and defeat!

EMBARK ON AN ADVENTURE!

Embark on an epic campaign where strategy meets survival. Navigate and conquer ruthless environments, each with its own unique challenges and enemies. Master the mechanics, towers, and strategies as you beat map after map, uncovering the lore behind TNC!. 

Along the way, unlock powerful abilities to prepare for the ultimate showdown with The Necromancer himself. 

Do you have what it takes to survive when The Necromancer Cometh?

CRAFT YOUR DEFENSES!

  • Unlock dozens of towers and cards as you play! Mix and match their unique abilities to deal maximum damage!

  • Buff your towers with wild combos that make them even deadlier!

  • Improve your economy and rake in the gold as you kill your foes!

  • Find magical items and equip them to your towers to make them even stronger!

MASTER MAZE-BUILDING!

  • Where you place your towers is just as important as what tower you build! Build a maze which maximizes the effectiveness of each tower!

  • Build huge mazes with hundreds of towers and force your enemy to take the long way! There is no limit to what you can build in TNC!

  • Defend against waves of enemies and mini bosses, each with a unique ability that will test your defenses!

  • Take advantage of the level features as you build unique mazes through procedurally generated levels!

DELVE INTO THE DARK WORLD OF THE NECROMANCER!

  • Explore the dark-but-whimsical fantasy world of The Necromancer!

  • Meet a cast of playful characters!

  • Enjoy the cheeky ska-inspired soundtrack!

Can you survive when The Necromancer Cometh?
